final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night 杭州 self-guided itinerary, with a real 杭州 map as the central spine and landmark-illustrated panels floating on cardstock.

Style/medium: needs a travel-attack-card / illustrated brochure aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real 杭州 map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly, landmark icons floating above cardstock with drop shadows
Subject: must include all scenic spots, dining, and tips across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1 (西湖经典游): 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺；午餐：楼外楼（东坡肉＋龙井虾仁，人均150元）
  Day 2 (禅意杭州): 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰造像 / 法喜寺 / 宋城；晚餐：素描餐厅（榴莲烤鸡＋焦糖布丁，人均90元）
  Day 3 (九溪烟树徒步): 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径；晚餐：茶人村（私房桂鱼＋香芋煲，人均120元）
  Day 4A (运河文艺线): 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺；Day 4B (西溪湿地): 周家村 / 深潭口 / 氦气球俯瞰湿地
Scene/backdrop: must be a real 杭州 map base with geographic routes connecting all day-panels; each panel features characteristic landmark illustrations (断桥、雷峰塔、灵隐寺、竹径、拱宸桥 etc.) with floating-on-cardstock treatment
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting travel-guide atmosphere — exact light and shadow treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking 江南 water-ink and warm paper tones — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock base with floating landmark cutouts casting soft shadows; needs a tactile printed-brochure surface feel — exact paper grain and finish are yours
Text (verbatim): must include the following copy distributed across panels:
  Panel titles: "第一天：西湖经典游" / "第二天：禅意杭州" / "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" / "第四天：文艺收官"
  Highlights per panel (verbatim): 断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 / 灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 / 九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 / 拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺
  Tips: "⏰ 7:30出发，避开人流高峰" / "🚲 租共享单车（每小时5元）" / "🎭 《宋城千古情》贵宾席320元" / "🎈 氦气球俯瞰湿地180元"
  伴手礼: "南宋胡记荷花酥（38元/盒）" / "万事利丝绸方巾（150-300元）"
  交通: "地铁1号线 萧山机场→西湖（7元/50分钟）" / "7W路 龙翔桥→灵隐寺（5元）"
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of 杭州 map; all 4 day-panels must be visible in the tri-fold layout; all 景点 names preserved; landmark illustrations must have identifiable architectural/natural features matching each site
Avoid: generic tourist-map clip art; illegible small text; flat non-layered layout
